text: I feel the curious excitement of wandering into an unfamiliar yet inviting space—a corridor bathed in pale light, the promise of discovery behind glass walls. As I step closer and read the illuminated "R+D" wall, thoughtful words drift through my mind, speaking of care, reflection, and growth within sterile architecture. There's an atmosphere of quiet hopefulness here, tinged with intellectual optimism. I'm drawn to the idea that within such ordered, controlled surroundings, seeds for new ideas and connections might be sown—oddly comforted by the contrast between bureaucracy and the gentle push for a better, more inclusive world.
